mapper.select: SELECT * FROM upgrade_releases WHERE platform = #{platform} AND is_active = true ORDER BY published_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM upgrade_releases WHERE platform = #{platform} AND version = #{version} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE upgrade_releases SET is_active = false WHERE platform = #{platform} AND is_active = true
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO upgrade_releases (version, release_type, release_notes, download_url, platform, arch, package_type, file_name, file_size, sha256, min_version, is_active, published_at) VALUES (#{version}, #{releaseType}, #{releaseNotes}, #{downloadUrl}, #{platform}, #{arch}, #{packageType}, #{fileName}, #{fileSize}, #{sha256}, #{minVersion}, #{isActive}, #{publishedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM upgrade_releases WHERE platform = #{platform} ORDER BY published_at DESC
SELECT * FROM upgrade_releases ORDER BY published_at DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM upgrade_releases
WHERE platform = #{platform}
